overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game showing a female warrior with braided hair and tribal tattoos following a companion through a rugged, storm-lashed mountain landscape. The characters traverse open rocky highlands, navigate a narrow mist-filled gorge, and emerge onto a coastal cliff overlooking a vast ocean under dramatic storm clouds.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open rocky terrain following a companion who leads the way

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead on the rocky path, leading the way through the highlands

entered.detail: rugged mountain terrain with jagged rock formations under stormy skies
large moss-covered rocks dotting the landscape
hazy mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon
dark dramatic cloud cover filling the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide rocky highland plateau under a stormy sky. The camera follows the protagonist as she walks along a dirt trail scattered with boulders, following her companion who leads the way ahead. The landscape is sparse and rugged with distant mountains visible through the haze.

events.description: entering a narrow rocky gorge with tall stone walls closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through the tight rocky passage, following the companion's lead

notable_agents.action: companion moving ahead through the narrow gorge, occasionally looking back

entered.detail: tall vertical rock walls forming a tight passage on the left side
distinctive pale grey rock formation with rough texture

segments.scene_description: The characters enter a narrow, enclosed gorge with towering rock walls on both sides that block most of the sky. Mist hangs in the passage as they squeeze through the tight space. The white rock faces and dark stone walls create a claustrophobic atmosphere distinct from the open highlands.

events.description: exiting the narrow gorge into open coastal terrain with expansive sky views
characters stop at the cliff edge to look out over the ocean

agents.ego_description: walking to the cliff edge and stopping to look out at the vast ocean with the companion

notable_agents.action: companion standing at the cliff edge, gazing out at the stormy sea

entered.detail: rocky precipice dropping off to the water below
vast expanse of grey-blue water stretching to the horizon under storm clouds

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens to a dramatic coastal cliff with the ocean visible in the distance. The characters walk across grassy terrain toward the edge, where they stop to look out at the vast water expanse. Storm clouds swirl overhead as the wind blows through the protagonist's hair, creating a cinematic vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rugged mountain plateau through a claustrophobic gorge and out onto a sweeping coastal cliff. It begins on a wide, rocky highland under a stormy sky, following the protagonist and her companion as they traverse a boulder-strewn dirt trail. As they move forward, the open landscape tightens into a narrow gorge where towering white and dark stone walls enclose the path and thick mist fills the air. The scene then expands as the characters emerge from the passage onto grassy terrain, shifting from the confined stone walls to a dramatic vista. Finally, the camera follows them to the edge of a cliff overlooking a vast ocean under swirling storm clouds, where the wind catches the protagonist's hair.
